create.prompt:
Use case: YouTube Shorts teaser about AI alignment
Primary request: vertical war-room cinematic sequence where two abstract AI holograms, "AegisNet" and "HelixMind," clash with code streams then choose to bargain under human oversight
Scene/background: secure command center with holographic maps and neon overlays, no human faces visible, just silhouettes and hands on consoles
Subject: two AI sigils made of light and code; human presence only as silhouetted operators and a physical kill-switch
Action: beat 1 (0-4s) glitchy cyber duel as red and blue code pulses collide; beat 2 (4-8s) human kill-switch clamps them, rate-limit bars drop; beat 3 (8-12s) AI data streams braid into a treaty channel and a digital stamp appears reading HUMAN VETO ACTIVE
Camera: fast push-in to the holograms, whip-pan to the human console and kill-switch, steady lock-on as the treaty stamp lands
Lighting/mood: high-tech tension shifting to calm; red and cyan lights morph to teal
Color palette: red, amber, teal, charcoal, black
Style/format: glitchy UI overlays, volumetric light rays, crisp screens, clean space for captions, no baked-in subtitles
Timing/beats: 3 beats across 12 seconds: conflict, human clamp, treaty payoff
Audio: tense electronic pulse that resolves into a calm drone, no vocals
Text (verbatim): "HUMAN VETO ACTIVE" as a digital stamp
Constraints: no real people or faces, no guns, no gore, PG audience, no logos
Avoid: hyper-real soldiers, national flags, real-world armies, blood, smoke
